subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में किस लोकल कंटेनर है?
C_en: Cenotaph of Maharaja Sawai Jai Singh II
C_hi: महाराज सवाई जयसिंगी स्वामी जाय सिंगी स्वामी जयसिंगी स्वामी जाय
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous palace located in Jaipur, known for its unique architecture.
explanation_hi: हवा महाल यूक्ता मंदिर के नाम वाले पाल, यह विश्वास के वाले महाल का विवरण उच्च मैंड मैंड है।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which dance form is popular in Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान में प्रभविता कालाबाज़ा क्या संत्रों को क्या संत्रों निर्मान क्या पर्यावर्जर्मान प्रभविता को क्या प्रेम

option_en.option_explanation: Ghoomar is a popular folk dance form originated in the Jaisalmer region of Rajasthan and is performed by women.
Ekra is a traditional Rajasthani dance form performed by both men and women.
Ghoomar originated in Jaisalmer and is performed by women. It is known for its graceful movements and vibrant costumes.
